3058470.name: All On Board! - Rallyman GT
3058470.description:
Get this DLC to host Rallyman GT sessions in All On Board!

All players need All On Board! to participate, but only the host must own this DLC, letting others join without having to buy it.

1-6 Players | 45-60 mins

Recommended Age: 14+

Take the driver’s seat in Rallyman GT, now adapted for VR in All On Board!

Roll your gear dice to accelerate, coast, or brake as you push toward the finish line. Take risks with bold maneuvers or play it safe to avoid spinning out.

Plan your best line through corners and straights with your dice. The more dice you roll, the faster you go, but beware: stacking warning symbols can send your car spinning and cost you precious ground.

Navigate sharp turns, master tricky maneuvers, and outpace your rivals to cross the finish line first.

Key Features:

- Fast-paced dice mechanics: balance speed and control with gear, coast, and brake dice

- Select from a variety of tracks

- Risk and reward: push your speed or play it safe to avoid spinning out

- Solo or multiplayer: race against the clock or up to 5 opponents

- Includes a themed scenario and dedicated soundtrack

- Available in EFIGS (English, French, Italian, German, Spanish)

- Easy to learn with rulebook and video tutorial

Do you have what it takes to conquer the track?
3058470.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 法语, 意大利语, 德语
